<style>
/* Center all laser cut tags */
.CNCtax, .CNCtax {
    text-align: center; /* center parent */
}

.CNCtax a, .CNCtax a {
    float: none;           /* remove left float */
    display: inline-block; /* let links sit inline */
    margin: 0 5px;         /* space between tags */
}

body{font-size:16px;line-height:1.4;font-family:sans-serif;margin:50px 0 0;padding:0;color:#333}
h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6{font-weight:500;text-align:center} /* centered titles */
li{list-style:none}
h1{font-size:1.71428571em;letter-spacing:-.01em;line-height:1.16666667;margin:5px 0}
h2{font-size:22px}
h3{font-size:18px}
h4{font-size:16px}
h5{font-size:14px}
h6{font-size:14px}
#catdes{font-size:14px;color:#7d7d7d;font:13px/15px Arial,sans serif;margin:0 0 5px;text-align:center} /* centered description */
a{color:#56626d;text-decoration:none}
.clear{clear:both}
.header{background:#fff;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;z-index:800;box-shadow:0 1px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,.12)}
#search-wrapper{display:inline}
#searchform #s{font-size:16px;outline:0;height:38px;border:0;width:100%;background:#e2e2e2;border-radius:4px;padding:7px 10px;box-sizing:border-box}
#searchform{display:inline-block;margin-top:1px;width:50%}
.logo img{max-height:40px;float:left;padding:0 8px 0 10px}
#content{padding:10px 20px;margin-top: 90px;}
.start-area{margin:auto;width:1376px}
.mid-area{padding:0;float:left;width:1376px}
@media only screen and (max-width:888px){.start-area{margin:auto;width:100%}.mid-area{padding:0;float:none;width:100%}}
@media only screen and (min-width:888px){.start-area{margin:auto;width:848px}.mid-area{padding:0;float:left;width:848px}}
@media only screen and (min-width:1152px){.start-area{margin:auto;width:1112px}.mid-area{padding:0;float:left;width:1112px}}
@media only screen and (min-width:1416px){.start-area{margin:auto;width:1376px}.mid-area{padding:0;float:left;width:1376px}}
@media only screen and (min-width:1680px){.start-area{margin:auto;width:1640px}.mid-area{padding:0;float:left;width:1640px}}
#content-head,.site-footer,.wp-pagenavi{text-align:center}
.post-class,.post-item{display:inline-block;padding:7px;cursor:default;margin:5px;width:236px;background-color:#f9f9f9;border-radius:5px;text-align:center} /* centered post items */
.post-item{margin:5px 12px}
.post-class:hover,.post-item:hover{background:#ececec}
.indexImg,.indexImg img{max-width:236px;margin:auto;text-align:center}
.indexImg img{max-height:500px;display:block;margin:0 auto}
.post-linkarea h2{font-size:14px;margin:2px;text-align:center} /* centered title */
.file_size{font-size:14px;color:#7d7d7d;text-align:center} /* centered file size */
.side_cat li{padding:5px 10px;margin:5px;border:solid 1px #e9e9e9;box-shadow:1px 1px 0 0 #adadad;text-align:center}
.wp-pagenavi{clear:both;margin:30px 0;background-color:#f5f5f5;border-radius:6px;padding:20px}
.wp-pagenavi span.current{font-weight:700}
.wp-pagenavi a:hover,.wp-pagenavi span.current{background-color:#7d7d7d;color:#fff}
.wp-pagenavi a,.wp-pagenavi span{text-decoration:none;margin:2px;padding:4px 9px;font-size:13px}
.zoom{font-size:12px;color:#7d7d7d;text-align:center}
.myimg{padding:5px;text-align:center}
.myimg img{border-radius:8px;max-width:600px;max-height:800px;display:block;margin:0 auto}
.post-main{max-width:300;margin:16px auto;margin-top:0;padding:0;text-align:center} /* center post main */
.textarea{display:inline-block;vertical-align:top;padding-right:5px;text-align:center}
.post_description{line-height:1.4;text-align:center} /* center description */
.post-category{display:inherit;background:#56626d;padding:0 8px;border-radius:3px;text-align:center}
.post-category a{color:#fff}
.CNCtax a{float:center;margin-right:10px;text-decoration:underline}
#download img{display:inline-block;float:none;margin:0 auto} /* center download images */
#download,.socialmedia{display:inline-block;vertical-align:bottom;text-align:center} /* center download and social */
.CNCtax2{background:#fff;padding:0 5px}
.CNCtax2 a{font-size:14px;display:block;border-bottom:solid 1px #f1f1f1;margin-bottom:3px;padding:5px 0;text-align:center}
.site-footer{padding:10px 5px;background:#e2e2e2;text-align:center}
#copyright a,#copyright h3{display:inline-block;padding:0 10px}
.modal{display:none;position:fixed;z-index:2;padding-top:100px;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:auto;background-color:rgba(0,0,0,.9)}
.modal-content{margin:auto;display:block;width:80%;max-width:700px}
#caption{margin:auto;display:block;width:80%;max-width:800px;text-align:center;color:#ccc;padding:10px 0;height:150px}
#caption,.modal-content{-webkit-animation-name:zoom;-webkit-animation-duration:.6s;animation-name:zoom;animation-duration:.6s}
@-webkit-keyframes zoom{from{-webkit-transform:scale(0)}to{-webkit-transform:scale(1)}}
@keyframes zoom{from{transform:scale(0)}to{transform:scale(1)}}
.close{position:absolute;right:35px;color:#f1f1f1;font-size:40px;font-weight:700;transition:.3s}
.close:focus,.close:hover{color:#bbb;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer}
@media only screen and (max-width:700px){.modal-content{width:100%}.myimg img{width:100%}#download{margin-bottom:5px}#searchform{width:100%;margin:1px}#content{padding-top:45px}}
</style>

<style>
/* =========================
   WRAPPER
========================= */
.axis-menu-wrapper {
    background: #ffffff;
    border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 100;
}

/* =========================
   MAIN MENU
========================= */
.axis-menu {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 14px 0;
    margin: 0;
    list-style: none;
}

.axis-menu > li {
    position: static;
}

.axis-menu > li > a {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: #000;
    padding: 6px 0;
    display: inline-block;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.axis-menu > li > a:hover {
    color: #111;
}

/* =========================
   FULL WIDTH MEGA MENU
========================= */
.axis-mega {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;

    background: #fff;
    padding: 28px 60px;

    display: flex;
    gap: 36px;
    justify-content: flex-start;

    border-top: 1px solid #eee;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);

    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
}

.has-mega.open .axis-mega {
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible;
    pointer-events: auto;
}

/* =========================
   COLUMNS
========================= */
.axis-col {
    min-width: 200px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding-right: 28px;
    border-right: 1px solid #eee;
}

.axis-col:last-child {
    border-right: none;
    padding-right: 0;
}

/* =========================
   HEADINGS
========================= */
.axis-col h4 {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    color: #000;
}

.axis-line {
    height: 1px;
    background: #ddd;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

/* =========================
   SUB CATEGORY LINKS (ENHANCED)
========================= */
.axis-col a {
    font-size: 15px;        /* BIGGER */
    font-weight: 500;      /* STRONGER */
    color: #333;           /* DARKER */
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 6px 0;        /* MORE SPACE */
    line-height: 1.4;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.axis-col a:hover {
    color: #000;
    text-decoration: underline;
}

/* =========================
   MENU SEPARATORS
========================= */
.axis-menu > li::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    right: -6px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 1px;
    height: 16px;
    background: #e0e0e0;
}

.axis-menu > li:last-child::after {
    display: none;
}

/* =========================
   RESPONSIVE SAFETY
========================= */
@media (max-width: 1200px) {
    .axis-mega {
        padding: 22px;
        overflow-x: auto;
    }
}

</style>
<script>
document.querySelectorAll('.has-mega').forEach(item => {
    let timer;

    item.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
        clearTimeout(timer);
        item.classList.add('open');
    });

    item.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        timer = setTimeout(() => {
            item.classList.remove('open');
        }, 400);
    });
});
</script>
